description: SF110 Java source files selected as candidates for automated JUnit 5 test generation by a 7B LLM

selection_criteria.preference: Pure logic classes with minimal external dependencies

candidates.description: Converts strings between camelCase and delimiter-separated formats (e.g. 'helloWorld' <-> 'hello-world')
candidates.notes: Zero imports (uses CharPool constant only). All static methods. Perfect pure string utility.

candidates.description: Provides precise arithmetic operations (add, subtract, multiply, divide, scale) on doubles using BigDecimal
candidates.notes: Only java.math imports. All static methods. Pure math utility, trivially testable.

candidates.description: Array utility with min/max on 1D/2D generic arrays, arrayEquals, box/unbox, and row-to-column-major conversion
candidates.notes: Zero imports. All static methods. Self-contained pure array logic. Excellent for testing.

candidates.description: Math utility with minOf, maxOf, averageOf, sumOf (various array types), and medianOf operations on collections/arrays
candidates.notes: Only java.math/java.util imports. All static. Rich testable behavior with edge cases.

candidates.description: Null-safe utility for equals, hashCode, allNull, noneNull, and checkNotNull operations on objects
candidates.notes: Zero imports. All static. Self-contained. Great for testing null-safety edge cases.

candidates.description: Comparable version class that parses dotted version strings (e.g. '2.1.10') and supports comparison/equality
candidates.notes: Only java.util imports. Self-contained. Implements Comparable. Rich comparison logic.

candidates.description: Serializable/Comparable/Cloneable identifier class with primary and secondary string identifiers, null-safe comparison
candidates.notes: Only java.io.Serializable import. Fully self-contained. equals/hashCode/compareTo/clone/toString.

candidates.description: ArrayList subclass that maintains sorted insertion order using binary search, with optional Comparator support
candidates.notes: Only java.util imports. Data structure with non-trivial insertion logic. Good for testing sorted behavior.

candidates.description: Sorted map backed by Vector with binary search for add/remove/get/containsKey/indexOf operations
candidates.notes: Only java.util imports. Self-contained data structure. Complex binary search logic, excellent for testing.

candidates.description: Converts byte arrays to/from string representations in hex, octal, decimal, or binary format with ASCII display option
candidates.notes: Zero imports. All static methods. Pure conversion logic with multiple radix modes. Rich test scenarios.

candidates.description: Validation utility: isInt, required, isDouble, isEmail (regex-based), and singleton getInstance
candidates.notes: Only java.util.regex imports. Singleton pattern. Pure validation logic, highly testable.

candidates.description: String and collection utilities: null-safe comparison, normalization, unordered Vector equality, max-value formatting
candidates.notes: Only java.util.Vector import. All static. Self-contained. Good mix of string and collection logic.

candidates.description: Immutable temperature value object with arithmetic operations (plus, minus, times), Comparable, and equals/hashCode
candidates.notes: Zero imports. Fully self-contained. Implements Comparable. Classic value object with arithmetic.

candidates.description: Date utility: get/set/restore current date (for testing), and elapsed time formatting (millis to 'P21H5M52S' string)
candidates.notes: Only java.util.Date import. Static methods. The elapsed time formatter is highly testable.

candidates.description: Paper format data class with width/height/tolerance, isTolerable comparison method, and toString builder
candidates.notes: Only java.io.Serializable import. Bean with tolerance-based matching logic. Good getter/setter + logic tests.

candidates.description: SQL-style pattern matcher that converts '%' and '_' wildcards to regex, supporting include/exclude filter lists
candidates.notes: Only java.util imports. Self-contained. Non-trivial regex compilation and matching logic.

candidates.description: IP-based filter configuration bean with enable/allowAccess flags, IP collection management, and XML serialization
candidates.notes: Only java.util imports. Self-contained. Has both data and toXML serialization logic.

candidates.description: Hash code computation utilities: chaining hashMore for int/long/boolean arrays, and Bob Jenkins byte array hash
candidates.notes: Zero imports. All static. Pure bit manipulation logic. Good for testing hash consistency.

candidates.description: Map construction utilities: build maps from key-value arrays (flat or 2D), with forward and reversed mapping support
candidates.notes: Only java.util imports. All static. Self-contained. Simple but clean testable utility methods.

candidates.description: Non-synchronized StringReader replacement with read, mark, reset, skip, and ready operations on strings
candidates.notes: Only java.io/java.nio imports. Extends Reader. Self-contained string reading logic with mark/reset support.
